title: Coco 'n' the Fellas @ Le QuecumBar
titleBg: Coco 'n' the Fellas в Le QuecumBar
description: Our first ever gig at the world's premier Django Reinhardt Gypsy Swing venue in London.
descriptionEn: Our first ever gig at the world's premier Django Reinhardt Gypsy Swing venue in London.
descriptionBg: Първият ни концерт в най-добрия клуб за джипси суинг в света — Le QuecumBar в Лондон.
body:
Come and support us at our first ever gig at the world's premier Django Rainhardt Gypsy Swing venue in London, Le QuecumBar. 

Coco 'n' the Fellas have prepared an estonishing programe and will take you through an experience you have never had before. The Swing will be on! 

Buy your tickets in advance to get discount:
http://quecumbar.co.uk/listings/events/4-jul-16-coco-n-the-fellas-le-quecumbar/

Hope to see you all there!!!
bodyEn:
Come and support us at our first ever gig at the world's premier Django Reinhardt Gypsy Swing venue in London, Le QuecumBar.

Coco 'n' the Fellas have prepared an astonishing program and will take you through an experience you have never had before. The Swing will be on!

Buy your tickets in advance to get a discount via the venue website.
bodyBg:
Елате и ни подкрепете в първия ни концерт в най-престижния клуб за джипси суинг в света — Le QuecumBar в Лондон.

Coco 'n' the Fellas са подготвили изумителна програма и ще ви отведат в едно неповторимо преживяване. Време е за суинг!

Купете билетите си предварително за отстъпка през сайта на клуба.
